parameters.content:
## Usability Test Summariser

**Setup:**
1. Create YOUR_OPENAI_CREDENTIAL and YOUR_SMTP_CREDENTIAL
2. Set USABILITY_EMAIL_TO
3. Post usability test notes/transcript snippets via webhook or use sample
4. LLM extracts task completion rates, key pain points, and UX recommendations
5. Approval gate before sharing with design and product

parameters.jsCode:
const { summary: s, meta: m } = $input.first().json;
const taskLines = (s.task_summaries||[]).map(t =>
  `  [${t.severity.toUpperCase()}] Task ${t.task_id}: ${t.task}\n  Success: ${t.success_rate_pct}% | Avg time: ${t.avg_time_seconds}s | Issue: ${t.primary_issue}\n  Quotes: ${(t.key_quotes||[]).map(q=>JSON.stringify(q)).join(', ')}`
).join('\n\n');
const report = [
  `USABILITY TEST SUMMARY: ${m.test_title}`,
  `Date: ${m.test_date} | Generated: ${m.generated_at}`,
  `Overall usability: ${s.overall_usability_rating?.toUpperCase()}`,
  ``,
  `EXECUTIVE SUMMARY: ${s.executive_summary}`,
  ``,
  `TASK RESULTS:`,
  taskLines,
  ``,
  `SYSTEMIC ISSUES:`,
  (s.systemic_issues||[]).map(i=>`  [${i.severity.toUpperCase()}] ${i.issue}\n  Tasks: ${i.affected_tasks.join(', ')} | Root cause: ${i.root_cause}`).join('\n') || '  (none)',
  ``,
  `POSITIVE FINDINGS:`,
  (s.positive_findings||[]).map(f=>`  ✓ ${f}`).join('\n'),
  ``,
  `DESIGN RECOMMENDATIONS:`,
  (s.design_recommendations||[]).map(r=>`  [${r.priority.toUpperCase()}] ${r.recommendation}\n  Tasks: ${r.affected_tasks.join(', ')} | Rationale: ${r.rationale}`).join('\n'),
].join('\n');
return [{ json: { ...($input.first().json), report_text: report } }];
